message:
Improve core package test coverage (52% → 54%)

- Add comprehensive statemachine.go tests achieving 100% coverage:
  - TransitionError.Error(), ValidateTransition, TransitionWithReason
  - GetValidTransitions, IsPending, IsApproved, IsComplete
  - RequiresApproval, CanApprove, CanExecute, CanCancel
  - CheckExpiry, CheckApprovalExpiry, StateMachine methods

- Add risk.go tests for ClassifyRisk, MinApprovalsForTier, IsSafeTier
- Add tests for type aliases and constant re-exports

Partial progress on bead 6zj (core package 51% → 90% coverage).
More work needed on: attachments.go, execute.go, patterns.go, dryrun.go
